allow: Bash(sed -i -e 's/IT department — available/IT department, available/g' -e 's/reputation — while keeping/reputation, while keeping/g' -e 's/scalability — but only/scalability, but only/g' -e 's/worlds — on-premises/worlds. On-premises/g' -e 's/productive — whether/productive, whether/g' -e 's/forward — with no obligation/forward, with no obligation/g' services.html)

Bash(sed -i -e 's/take for granted — proactive/take for granted: proactive/g' -e 's/professional services — so we understand/professional services, so we understand/g' -e 's/matters most — not the next business day/matters most, not the next business day/g' -e 's/our metric — we measure ours by yours/our metric. We measure ours by yours./g' -e 's/response time under 15 minutes — with/response time under 15 minutes, with/g' -e 's/like a glove — and adapts/like a glove, adapting/g' -e 's/what it costs — before/what it costs, before/g' -e 's/solutions — from the help desk/solutions, from the help desk/g' about.html)

Bash(sed -i -e 's/Not Sure — Let'\\''s Talk/Not Sure? Let'\\''s Talk/g' -e 's/genuinely free — no pressure/genuinely free. No pressure/g' -e 's/We'\\''re local — same-day/We'\\''re local. Same-day/g' -e 's/solutions — from the help desk/solutions, from the help desk/g' contact.html)

Bash(sed -i -e 's/future concept — it'\\''s reshaping/future concept. It'\\''s reshaping/g' -e 's/business technology — cybersecurity/business technology: cybersecurity/g' -e 's/IT is here — we'\\''re already seeing/IT is here. We'\\''re already seeing/g' -e 's/50th cloud migration — no data loss/50th cloud migration. No data loss/g' -e 's/your specific business — no jargon/your specific business. No jargon/g' -e 's/solutions — from the help desk/solutions, from the help desk/g' trends.html)
